mapper.select:
SELECT ID, ROLE_ID, ROLE_NM, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN FROM CM_ROLE WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
AND (ROLE_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ROLE_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY ROLE_ID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CM_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CM_ROLE (ROLE_ID, ROLE_NM, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{roleNm}, #{description}, NVL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE CM_ROLE SET ROLE_NM = #{roleNm}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE CM_ROLE SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_ID, MENU_ID, AUTH_CD FROM CM_ROLE_FUNC WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CM_ROLE_FUNC (ROLE_ID, MENU_ID, AUTH_CD, REG_ID) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{menuId}, #{authCd}, 'SYSTEM')
